rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into implementation scopes when binding implementation-level signal routing, and preserve AADL structure without introducing new ports or variables.
generic_rules: Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes, not type annexes.
Preserve AADL scope boundaries: use only ports, subcomponents, and connections explicitly defined in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed as `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Implementation contracts may use assignments but not guarantees for signal routing.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not encode event ports as Boolean or numeric values without explicit data-value support.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
